page_content:
MEDIA, TECHNOLOGY AND DEMOCRACY MINOR

The Media, Technology and Democracy minor will allow students to deepen their understanding of these three key areas of our society. Students will learn about the history of journalism, gain a better understanding of new media technology, improve their digital literacy, and examine how the news media shapes views of politics, culture and society. Students will expand their fluency in diversity, social justice, social media, artiﬁcial intelligence, investigative journalism, censorship and disinformation and better understand the value of a free press.
